editorNotes.purpose: Lists Markdown directive files that form the ADAPTIVE half of the codegen system prompt. Each directive contains placeholder defaults resolved through the Directive Cascade: EXPLICIT (brief/prompt) > INDICATED (Brief-LLM) > INFERRED (guidance-resolvers) > DEFAULT (directive file text).
editorNotes.metadataConvention: Each directive file uses HTML comments for metadata: <!-- directive: name -->, <!-- cascade: ... -->, <!-- default: value -->. These are parsed by directive-loader.ts.
